Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.AccelerationUnit

    • Uses of AccelerationUnit in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return AccelerationUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AccelerationUnit AccelerationFormatter.findUnit​(java.lang.String source)
      Attempts to determine an acceleration unit within a measurement string representation.
      static AccelerationUnit[] AccelerationUnit.getImperialUnits()
      Gets all supported imperial acceleration units.
      static AccelerationUnit[] AccelerationUnit.getMetricUnits()
      Gets all supported metric acceleration units.
      static AccelerationUnit AccelerationUnit.valueOf​(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static AccelerationUnit[] AccelerationUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type AccelerationUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Acceleration.add​(double value, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and updates current acceleration instance.
      static double Acceleration.add​(double value1, AccelerationUnit unit1, double value2, AccelerationUnit unit2, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two acceleration values and units and returns the result.
      void Acceleration.add​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and updates current acceleration instance.
      static java.lang.Number Acceleration.add​(java.lang.Number value1, AccelerationUnit unit1, java.lang.Number value2, AccelerationUnit unit2, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two acceleration values and unit and reeturns the result.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(double value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(Acceleration arg1, Acceleration arg2, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds two acceleration instances.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(Acceleration a, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided acceleration to current instance and returns a new acceleration.
      Acceleration Acceleration.addAndReturnNew​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit, AccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided acceleration value and unit and returns a new acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static double AccelerationConverter.convert​(double input, AccelerationUnit inputUnit, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void AccelerationConverter.convert​(Acceleration acceleration, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updated an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static void AccelerationConverter.convert​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit, Acceleration result)
      Converts an acceleration to requested output unit.
      static java.lang.Number AccelerationConverter.convert​(java.lang.Number input, AccelerationUnit inputUnit, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Acceleration AccelerationConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Acceleration input, AccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an acceleration instance to requested output unit.
      java.lang.String AccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String AccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvertImperial​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using imperial unit system.
      java.lang.String AccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvertMetric​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit)
      Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using metric unit system.
      java.lang.String AccelerationFormatter.getUnitSymbol​(AccelerationUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.
      static UnitSystem AccelerationUnit.getUnitSystem​(AccelerationUnit unit)
      Returns unit system for provided acceleration unit.
      static boolean AccelerationUnit.isImperial​(AccelerationUnit unit)
      Indicates whether provided unit belongs to the imperial unit system.
      static boolean AccelerationUnit.isMetric​(AccelerationUnit unit)
      Indicates whether provided unit belongs to the metric unit system.

      Subtracts provided acceleration value and unit and updates current acceleration instance.

      Subtracts two acceleration values and units and returns the result.

      Subtracts provided acceleration value and unit and updates current acceleration instance.

      Subtracts two acceleration values and units and returns the result.
